title: Tenderly Baked Russian Rice Pilaf
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring rice, syrup, and jocheong, baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven, with a floral and silky texture, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, rinse the rice and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat and saute the onion, carrot, and mushroom until tender.
In a large saucepan, combine the rice, jocheong, water, salt, and pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the sauteed vegetables.
Transfer the rice mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
